overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 7 capped by highest severity MEDIUM.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: This proposal outlines a partnership between TokenLogic and karpatkey to provide financial services to the Aave DAO for an initial period of 180 days, with a combined budget of 400k GHO. It creates two GHO streams and cancels an existing one.

disclosed_entities.name: TokenLogic & karpatkey
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This AIP onboards TokenLogic & karpatkey to provide financial services to the Aave DAO

disclosed_entities.name: TokenLogic recipient
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The following address will be the recipient of the 180k GHO stream: Address: 0x3e4A9f478C0c13A15137Fc81e9d8269F127b4B40

disclosed_entities.name: karpatkey recipient
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The following address will be the recipient of the 220k GHO stream: Address: 0x58e6c7ab55aa9012eacca16d1ed4c15795669e1c

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: The following address will be the recipient of the 220k GHO stream: Address: 0x58e6c7ab55aa9012eacca16d1ed4c15795669e1c
The following address will be the recipient of the 180k GHO stream: Address: 0x3e4A9f478C0c13A15137Fc81e9d8269F127b4B40

claimed_actions.raw_action: The AIP will call the createStream() method of the IAaveEcosystemReserveController interface to create two 180-day streams for 220k and 180k of GHO.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Creates two 180-day GHO streams to the service providers.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The AIP will call the createStream() method of the IAaveEcosystemReserveController interface to create two 180-day streams for 220k and 180k of GHO.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Upon execution of this AIP, TokenLogic's Orbit program GHO stream (StreamID 100017) will be cancelled.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Upon execution of this AIP, TokenLogic's Orbit program GHO stream (StreamID 100017) will be cancelled.

claimed_complexity.reason: Includes stream creation, stream cancellation, and initiates a strategic partnership with multiple ongoing operational mandates.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The AIP will call the createStream() method of the IAaveEcosystemReserveController interface to create two 180-day streams for 220k and 180k of GHO... Upon execution of this AIP, TokenLogic's Orbit program GHO stream (StreamID 100017) will be cancelled.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: The AIP will call the createStream() method of the IAaveEcosystemReserveController interface

limitations: Identities for the specific recipient addresses aren't explicitly assigned (just 220k and 180k to two addresses without identifying which is TokenLogic vs karpatkey)
